name: Fit for TV: The Reality of the Biggest Loser
original_name: Fit for TV: The Reality of the Biggest Loser
overview: Takes an inside look at the making of the hit reality TV competition, exploring the good, the bad, and the complicated. Featuring interviews with former contestants, trainers, producers, and health professionals, the documentary examines the show's approach to transformation, the support systems in place, and the unique challenges of filming reality television.
